title: PS 5.1 ConvertFrom-Json array unwrapping causes .Count failures and null-ref crashes
description: ConvertFrom-Json in PowerShell 5.1 returns $null for empty arrays and a bare object (not array) for single-element arrays. Calling .Count on these under StrictMode throws 'property Count cannot be found'. Fixed by wrapping all ConvertFrom-Json results with @() and using ,@() return pattern to preserve empty arrays through the pipeline.
detection_method: Runtime testing under PowerShell 5.1 with StrictMode

fix_applied.description: Wrapped all ConvertFrom-Json calls with @() to force array context. Used ,@() return pattern in Get-PipelineItems to preserve empty arrays through PS pipeline unwrapping. Added @() around pipeline filter results before .Count access.
